_comment: Word-native rectangle highlights overlaid on paragraphs. 'paragraph_index' is the 0-based index returned by python-docx (see README on how to find it for a target image). Offsets x_cm/y_cm are measured from the top-left of the anchor paragraph; w_cm/h_cm define the rectangle size; color is a 6-digit hex string without '#'. line_width_pt = border thickness. Demo entries below show two highlights overlaid on the Knauf SSO login screen (paragraph after image12.png).
